user_query: What advice did James receive from the famous players he met at the tournament?

node_data.text: James met the whole team of a famous player at the tournament and received gaming tips and autographs.

selected_nodes.reasoning: Mentions James receiving gaming tips and autographs from famous players at the tournament.

node_data.text: James remembers the gaming advice received was about proper communication and teamwork over ego.

selected_nodes.reasoning: Describes the gaming advice James received about proper communication and teamwork, which is relevant to advice from famous players.
